lib/features/auth/infrastructure/service.purpose: Core service for tracking token expiration times
key_features: Calculates time until token expiration with precision
Proactive refresh at 75% of token lifetime (configurable)
Handles edge cases: missing expiration, already expired, no expiration

changes: Updated to mark subtask 1.2 as completed
Added implementation details for completed subtasks
Updated risk assessment and next steps
Added technical specifications for remaining phases

implementation_patterns: Service-oriented architecture with clear separation of concerns
Stream-based event handling for reactive updates
Factory pattern for creating result objects with appropriate status
Dependency injection for testable and maintainable code
testing_patterns: Mock dependencies for isolated unit testing
Test categories organized by scenario types
project_management_patterns: Feature branch development with protection of main branch

technical_gotchas: Token expiration calculation must handle null/missing expiration timestamps
Proactive refresh timing needs to account for clock skew and network delays
Integration with existing TokenRefreshService requires proper error propagation
Stream events must be emitted consistently to prevent memory leaks
App lifecycle integration needed for proper background/foreground handling
testing_gotchas: Mocking token expiration requires precise timing control
Stream event testing needs proper async/await handling
Edge case testing requires comprehensive scenario coverage
Integration testing needs service composition verification
project_gotchas: Maintaining backward compatibility while adding new features
Performance impact of background refresh mechanisms
Storage migration for existing users with different session formats

approach.development_strategy: Feature branch protection with gradual rollout

success_metrics: Integration with existing auth system established
technical_achievements: Edge case handling for all expiration scenarios
next_steps: Set up CI/CD for automated testing
